mnemonics.title: DNS Hierarchy
mnemonics.content: Dear Kate, Please Come Over - Domain, Kingdom, Phylum, Class, Order (Domain levels: .com → example.com → www.example.com)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine inverted tree with root (.) at top, branches as TLDs (.com, .org), leaves as hostnames
Picture IP address as hotel room key with expiration date

analogies.analogy: Like a phonebook matching names (domains) to numbers (IPs)
Similar to a hotel concierge assigning rooms (IPs) to guests (devices)
